title: SQLancer crash on complex join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a Int32, b String, c UInt8);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, b, CAST(c AS String) AS c_str FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(v1.a, 0) + (CAST(t1.b AS Int32))) FROM v1 FULL OUTER JOIN t1 ON (v1.c_str LIKE CONCAT('%', t1.b, '%'));
CREATE TABLE t2 (x Float64, y Date DEFAULT today());
key_bug_features: full outer join with complex view and cast operations
